capabilities.title: Output Source Priority
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 1; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which source powers the load first.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

choices.label: Battery First
choices.description: Prefer battery, fall back to PV and utility.

choices.label: PV First
choices.description: Prefer PV, fall back to battery and utility.

choices.label: Utility First
choices.description: Prefer utility, fall back to PV and battery.

capabilities.title: Charge Source Priority
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 2; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which source charges the battery.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

choices.label: PV First
choices.description: Charge from PV first, utility assists.

choices.label: PV and Utility
choices.description: Charge from PV and utility together.

capabilities.title: AC Input Mode
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 8; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the accepted utility voltage window (appliance vs UPS).
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Overload Restart
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 20; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter recovers from an overload trip.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

choices.label: Switch to Utility
choices.description: Hand the load to utility after overload.

capabilities.title: Overtemperature Restart
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 21; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter recovers from an overtemperature trip.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

choices.label: No Restart
choices.description: Stay off after an overtemperature trip.

capabilities.title: Buzzer
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 22; single-register write (FC 0x06).
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the audible buzzer.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Max Charge Current
capabilities.note: Growatt SPF holding register 34 (10-130 A, utility + PV combined).
capabilities.change_summary: Limits the total battery charge current.
capabilities.support_notes: From GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11; not yet confirmed on hardware.
